---
name: Pull Request Template
about: Template for pull requests
title: " "
labels: []
assignees: ""
---

## Pull Request Overview

### Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code style/formatting (missing code style)
- [ ] Refactoring (non-breaking change that improves code quality)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Security improvement
- [ ] Test addition/improvement

### Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is resolved. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes #(issue number)

## Changes Made

### Frontend Changes

- [ ] Component updates
- [ ] Page modifications
- [ ] State management changes
- [ ] UI/UX improvements
- [ ] Performance optimizations

### Backend Changes

- [ ] API endpoint modifications
- [ ] Database schema changes
- [ ] Middleware updates
- [ ] Authentication/authorization changes
- [ ] Security improvements

### Other Changes

- [ ] Documentation updates
- [ ] Test additions
- [ ] Configuration changes
- [ ] Dependency updates
- [ ] Infrastructure changes

## Testing

### Test Coverage

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] E2E tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing completed

### Testing Instructions

Please describe how to test these changes:

1. [Step 1 for testing]
2. [Step 2 for testing]
3. [Step 3 for testing]

### Test Results

- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] New tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing successful

## Screenshots

If applicable, include screenshots to demonstrate your changes:

### Before Changes

[Attach screenshot of before state]

### After Changes

[Attach screenshot of after state]

## Related Issues

- Closes #(issue number)
- Related to #(issue number)
- Depends on #(issue number)
- Blocks #(issue number)

## Documentation

- [ ] README.md updated
- [ ] API documentation updated
- [ ] Code comments added/updated
- [ ] User documentation updated
- [ ] Developer documentation updated

## Technical Details

### Dependencies

- [ ] No new dependencies added
- [ ] Dependencies updated: [list dependencies]
- [ ] Dependencies removed: [list dependencies]

### Configuration

- [ ] No configuration changes
- [ ] Environment variables added: [list variables]
- [ ] Configuration files updated: [list files]

### Database Changes

- [ ] No database changes
- [ ] Schema changes: [describe changes]
- [ ] Migration needed: [describe migration]

### Breaking Changes

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking changes: [describe breaking changes]

## Deployment

### Deployment Notes

- [ ] No special deployment requirements
- [ ] Database migration required
- [ ] Environment variable changes required
- [ ] Cache invalidation required
- [ ] Other deployment considerations: [describe]

### Rollback Plan

- [ ] No rollback needed
- [ ] Rollback procedure: [describe rollback steps]

## Checklist

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings

### Testing

- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules

### Review Process

- [ ] I have reviewed the PR description and it's accurate
- [ ] I have assigned the appropriate reviewers
- [ ] I have added the appropriate labels
- [ ] I have linked to relevant issues

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the pull request here. Include:

- **Rationale**: Why this approach was chosen
- **Alternatives considered**: Other approaches that were considered
- **Performance impact**: Any performance implications
- **Security considerations**: Any security implications
- **Future work**: Plans for future improvements

## Acknowledgments

- [ ] I acknowledge that I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide
- [ ] I acknowledge that I have read the [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [ ] I agree to license my contributions under the [ISC License](../LICENSE)

---

**Thank you for contributing to EduQuest! ✨**
